The number '6227' is typed into the account number or code input field.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Frais de certification biologique' (or containing the keywords 'certification' and 'biologique') is typed into the account name or label input field.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The account '6227' with the name 'Frais de certification biologique' is visible in the Chart of Accounts list, or a green success notification confirms the account was created.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected account number is '6227'. The expected account name is 'Frais de certification biologique', which contains the verified keywords 'certification' and 'biologique'. This is a custom entry in the Ekylibre farm management system; ignore standard French Plan Comptable Général definitions for 6227.
